markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new team members and review project status and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Team Transition:** Aida Knezevic is rolling off; Megan Dickey (strategy) and Will Ruzvidzo (content) are the new GrowthX leads. Troy Blanchard (Director of Growth Marketing) is the new Deepgram lead.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Content Bottleneck:** 15 completed blog posts are awaiting Deepgram's review, creating a bottleneck that delays performance tracking and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**Strong Early SEO Signals:** The first 3 published blogs show promising results, including \~100 clicks, a 5.7 average rank, and \~300 keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Growth:** Weekly LLM referral sessions have grown to 2–2.5k. The next step is to identify the specific pages driving this growth to replicate the success.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Topics

### Team & Project Transition

  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [**Megan Dickey:** Managing Director → Overall SEO strategy & performance monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Will Ruzvidzo:** Content Lead → Content creation & quality.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**Erik O'Brien:** Account Strategist → Programmatic SEO (PSEO) strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
      - [**Aida Knezevic:** Rolling off, but available for questions.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Deepgram Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [**Troy Blanchard:** Director of Growth Marketing → New project lead.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [**Delano Fernando:** Providing MQL data via Dream Data.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Pipeline & Bottleneck

  - [**Status:** 15 completed blog posts are awaiting Deepgram's review.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**Impact:** This bottleneck delays publishing, which slows down performance tracking and the ability to gather data-driven insights.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Notion:** Central workspace for strategy, reports, and content briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Airtable:** Content calendar tracking status and links.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [**Google Drive:** Folder for all draft documents.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### SEO Performance (Early Signals)

  - [**Published Content:** 3 blog posts are live, with 1 ready for staging.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**GSC Metrics (Past Month):**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Clicks:** \~100](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Average Position:** 5.7](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Keyword Rankings:** \~300](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** The "Whisper vs. Deepgram" post has high impression volume, indicating strong potential if its click-through rate (CTR) can be improved.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**AI Optimization:** Comparison posts are favored by LLMs, helping to close critical content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Content Audit & Pruning

  - [**Recommendation:** Prune \~60–70 irrelevant or low-traffic blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Relevance:** Remove content unrelated to Deepgram's industry (e.g., "how AI consumes water").](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Performance:** Remove posts with no traction to improve site-wide SEO health.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Decision Logic:** Posts that influenced MQLs (via Dream Data) were kept, even if traffic was low.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**Future Plan:** Combine new content creation with refreshing high-priority existing posts.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### AI Visibility & LLM Traffic

  - [**Scrunch (AI Visibility Tool):**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Finding:** Deepgram has the highest visibility among 9 tracked competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Note:** This tool measures presence, not direct traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard (LLM Traffic):**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Finding:** Weekly LLM referral sessions have grown to 2–2.5k.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Significance:** This growth occurred despite a recent ChatGPT algorithm update that favored sites like Wikipedia.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
      - [**Action:** Identify the specific pages driving this growth to replicate the success.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Troy Blanchard:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [Request content review from Jose to unblock the 15 pending blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Connect with Delano Fernando to review the Dream Data MQL tracking process.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Schedule a deep-dive sync with Megan Dickey for early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [**Aida Knezevic:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [Provide Troy Blanchard with access to the Airtable content calendar, Google Drive folder, and Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [Analyze the Looker dashboard to identify which landing pages are driving the recent LLM traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [**Megan Dickey:**](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
      - [Schedule the deep-dive sync with Troy Blanchard for early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9XjshhLayHPiJKH2TKxw2keRU4WhWmXu?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
